scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w frontend && npm run lint:fix -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w frontend && npm run format:check -w backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w frontend && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.ci:local: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:typecheck && npm run ci:format && npm run ci:build && npm run ci:images
scripts.ci:all: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:typecheck && npm run ci:format && npm run test && npm run ci:images && npm run ci:build
scripts.precommit:strict: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.CI && !process.env.VERCEL && !process.env.RENDER && !process.env.NETLIFY && !process.env.GITHUB_ACTIONS) { const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('npx', ['husky'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); }"
